---
description: "Check paper novelty and find similar publications"
agent: "reviewer"
argument-hint: "Brief description of the contribution to check"
---

Assess the novelty of our contribution:

**Contribution**: {{input}}

1. Search for existing publications with similar approaches
2. Identify overlapping contributions in concurrent bloom filter literature
3. Check for relaxed data structure papers that cover similar ground
4. Clearly articulate what differentiates our work (if anything)
5. Flag any novelty risks with specific paper references
